requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Regulation of
Payment Aggregators) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: Bank of India (Regulation of Payment Aggregators) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be effective immediately unless indicated otherwise for
any specific provision herein.
requirements.object: indicated otherwise for any specific provision herein

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall apply to all bank and non-bank entities undertaking the
business of Payment Aggregator (PA) as defined herein.
requirements.object: and non-bank entities undertaking the business of Payment Aggregator (PA) as defined herein

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall
also apply to all Authorised Dealer banks as well as Scheduled Commercial
Banks which engage with entities undertaking PA business, to the extent
hereinafter specified.
requirements.object: Authorised Dealer banks as well as Scheduled Commercial Banks which engage with entities undertaking PA business, to the extent here

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: For the purposes of this definition, the term 'digital & electronic
network' shall include network of computers, television channels and any other
internet application used in automated manner such as web pages, extranets,
mobiles, etc.
requirements.object: television channels and any other internet application used in automated manner such as web pages, extranets, mobiles, e

requirements.full_sentence:
PA - Cross Border (PA - CB): PA that facilitates aggregation of
cross-border payments for current account transactions, that are not
prohibited under FEMA, for its onboarded merchants through
e-commerce mode.
requirements.object: onboarded merchants through e-commerce mode

requirements.full_sentence:
There are two sub-categories of PA-CB:
a) PA-CB facilitating inward transaction
b) PA-CB facilitating outward transaction
Note: (1) A non-bank entity authorised as AD Category-II, and
facilitating current account transactions not prohibited under FEMA
(other than purchase or sale of goods or service), shall not fall within
the purview of PA - CB business.
requirements.object: of PA - CB business

requirements.full_sentence:
Central KYC Records Registry (CKYCR), Officially Valid Document (OVD),
equivalent e-document, digital KYC, and Video-based Customer Identification
Procedure (V-CIP) shall have the same meanings as defined in RBI Master
Direction DBR.AML.BC.No.81/14.01.001/2015-16 dated February 25, 2016 on
'Master Direction - Know Your Customer (KYC) Direction, 2016', as amended
from time to time (hereinafter referred to as 'MD on KYC').
requirements.object: as defined in RBI Master Direction DBR

requirements.full_sentence:
A non- bank entity shall seek authorisation for operating as a PA by submitting
an application through RBI's online portal.
requirements.object: as a PA by submitting an application through RBI's online portal

requirements.timeline: within 45 days of obtaining the NOC
requirements.full_sentence:
An entity, regulated by any of the
financial sector regulator(s), shall apply along with a 'No Objection Certificate'
(NOC) from such regulator(s), within 45 days of obtaining the NOC.
requirements.object: 'No Objection Certificate' (NOC) from such regulator(s), within 45 days of obtaining the NOC

requirements.full_sentence:
A non-bank PA shall be a company incorporated in India under the
Companies Act, 2013.
requirements.object: in India under the Companies Act, 2013

requirements.full_sentence:
The Memorandum of Association of the applicant
entity should cover the proposed activity of operating as a PA.
requirements.object: of operating as a PA

requirements.full_sentence:
A PA having a Certificate of Authorisation (CoA) issued by RBI, and
a) already carrying on business as a PA-P - shall intimate RBI.
A revised CoA shall be issued to the PA.
requirements.object: PA

requirements.full_sentence:
b) desirous of commencing business in another PA category -
shall intimate RBI at least 30 days prior to commencing the
new business.
requirements.object: 30 days prior to commencing the new business

conditions: if any, through the online portal
requirements.full_sentence:
An entity, whose application for grant of CoA for PA-O or PA - CB
is under consideration of RBI - shall intimate the Reserve Bank
about its existing PA-P business, if any, through the online portal,
by December 31, 2025.
requirements.object: about its existing PA-P business

requirements.full_sentence:
An entity carrying on only PA-P business shall apply for
authorisation as prescribed in 5 (b) above, by December 31, 2025.
requirements.object: prescribed in 5 (b) above, by December 31, 2025

requirements.full_sentence:
An entity which fails to apply by the due date shall intimate its
banker(s) forthwith and wind up its business by February 28, 2026.
requirements.object: and wind up its business by February 28, 2026

requirements.full_sentence:
Application of an entity, not meeting the minimum capital requirement, or
which is incomplete / not in the prescribed form, shall be returned.

requirements.object: of ₹15 crore at the time of tendering application for authorisation

requirements.full_sentence:
and shall attain a minimum net-worth of ₹25 crore by the
end of third financial year of grant of authorisation.
requirements.object: of ₹25 crore by the end of third financial year of grant of authorisation

requirements.full_sentence:
The minimum networth, as applicable, shall be maintained by a PA on an
ongoing basis.
requirements.object: PA on an ongoing basis

requirements.full_sentence:
For the purposes of this MD, computation of net worth of an entity shall be
guided by the directions in RBI circular DPSS.CO.AD.No.1344
02.27.005/2014-15 dated January 16, 2015 on 'Computation of Net-worth',
as amended from time to time.
requirements.object: directions in RBI circular DPSS

requirements.full_sentence:
In addition to the items provided in the said
circular, "net worth" shall also include preference shares that are compulsorily
convertible to equity.
requirements.object: that are compulsorily convertible to equity

requirements.full_sentence:
Compulsorily convertible preference shares can be
either non-cumulative or cumulative, and they should be compulsorily
convertible into equity shares and the shareholder agreements should
specifically prohibit any withdrawal of this preference share capital at any
time.
requirements.object: equity shares and the shareholder agreements should specifically prohibit any withdrawal of this preference share cap

conditions:
if Deferred Tax Assets have been included in any of the
components
requirements.full_sentence:
Additionally, if Deferred Tax Assets have been included in any of the
components, the same shall be deducted while arriving at the net-worth value.
requirements.object: at the net-worth value

requirements.full_sentence:
An entity, having Foreign Direct Investment (FDI), shall be guided by the
Consolidated FDI Policy of the Government of India, and the relevant Foreign
Exchange Management Regulations on this subject.
requirements.object: Consolidated FDI Policy of the Government of India, and the relevant Foreign Exchange Management Regulations on this subject

requirements.full_sentence:
An entity seeking PA authorisation shall submit a certificate in the enclosed
format (Annexure 2.1) from their statutory auditor evidencing compliance with
the applicable net-worth requirement while submitting the application for
authorisation.
requirements.object: the enclosed format (Annexure 2

requirements.full_sentence:
A newly incorporated non-bank entity which may not have an
audited statement of financial accounts shall submit a certificate in the
enclosed format from their statutory auditor regarding current networth along
with a provisional balance sheet as of recent date.
requirements.object: the enclosed format from their statutory auditor regarding current networth along with a provisional balance sheet as of recen

requirements.full_sentence: A PA shall be professionally managed.

The promoters and directors of the
entity shall satisfy the fit and proper criteria as below:
i.
requirements.object: proper criteria as below: i

requirements.full_sentence:
The promoters and directors of the applicant entity may submit a declaration
in the enclosed format (Annexure 2.5).
requirements.object: the enclosed format (Annexure 2

requirements.full_sentence:
RBI may also check 'fit and proper'
status of the applicant entity and management thereof by obtaining inputs
from other regulators, government departments, etc., as deemed fit.
requirements.object: proper' status of the applicant entity and management thereof by obtaining inputs from other regulators, government departments, e

requirements.full_sentence:
As
regards fulfilment of 'fit and proper' criteria, RBI's decision shall be final.

conditions:
in case of takeover / acquisition of control of non-bank PSOs and sale /
transfer of payment system activity of non-bank PSO'
requirements.full_sentence:
Any takeover or acquisition of control or change in the management of a non-
bank PA shall adhere to RBI circular CO.DPSS.POLC.No.S-590/02-14-
006/2022-23 dated July 4, 2022 on 'Requirement for obtaining prior approval
in case of takeover / acquisition of control of non-bank PSOs and sale /
transfer of payment system activity of non-bank PSO', as amended from time
to time.
requirements.object: CO

requirements.full_sentence:
This provision shall also apply to an entity whose application for
authorisation as PA is pending with RBI.
requirements.object: entity whose application for authorisation as PA is pending with RBI

requirements.full_sentence:
A PA shall have a dispute resolution mechanism to handle payment related
disputes in transactions facilitated by it.
requirements.object: mechanism to handle payment related disputes in transactions facilitated by it

requirements.full_sentence:
The mechanism should also include
timelines for processing refunds, etc.
requirements.object: processing refunds, etc

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy shall ensure adherence to
the instructions issued by RBI including on Turn Around Time (TAT) for
resolution of failed transactions issued vide DPSS.CO.PD
No.629/02.01.014/2019-20 dated September 20, 2019 (as amended from
time to time).
requirements.object: instructions issued by RBI including on Turn Around Time (TAT) for resolution of failed transactions issued vide DPSS

requirements.full_sentence:
Agreements between a PA, its merchants, its acquiring banks, and all other
stakeholders shall clearly delineate the roles and responsibilities of the
involved parties, inter alia covering manner of refunds, treatment of failed
transactions, return policy, grievance redressal, reconciliation, etc.
requirements.object: and responsibilities of the involved parties, inter alia covering manner of refunds, treatment of failed transactions, ret

requirements.full_sentence:
The PA shall disclose comprehensive information regarding its merchant
policies, privacy policy and other terms and conditions on its website and / or
its mobile application.
requirements.object: its merchant policies, privacy policy and other terms and conditions on its website and / or its mobile a

requirements.full_sentence:
The PA shall appoint an officer responsible for responding to issues raised by
its merchants along with an escalation matrix for grievance redressal.
requirements.object: for responding to issues raised by its merchants along with an escalation matrix for grievance redressal

requirements.full_sentence:
Details
of the officer and escalation matrix shall be prominently displayed on its
website.
requirements.object: its website

requirements.full_sentence:
PA shall put in place adequate
Information and Data Security infrastructure and systems for detection and
prevention of frauds.
requirements.object: Information and Data Security infrastructure and systems for detection and prevention of frauds

requirements.full_sentence:
PA shall ensure that infrastructure of the merchants is
compliant with security standards like PCI-DSS and PCI-SSF, as may be
applicable.
requirements.object: the merchants is compliant with security standards like PCI-DSS and PCI-SSF, as may be applicable

requirements.full_sentence:
PA shall put in place a Board approved Information Security Policy for safety
and security of the payment systems operated by it and implement security
measures in accordance with the said policy to mitigate identified as well as
emerging risks.
requirements.object: Board approved Information Security Policy for safety and security of the payment systems operated by it and implement security measure

requirements.full_sentence:
PA shall ensure adherence to baseline technology-related
recommendations as provided in Annexure 1.
requirements.object: technology-related recommendations as provided in Annexure 1

requirements.full_sentence:
PA shall comply with data storage requirements as applicable to Payment
System Operators (PSOs) as laid out in RBI circular DPSS.CO.OD
No.2785/06.08.005/2017-2018 dated April 6, 2018 on 'Storage of Payment
System Data', as amended from time to time.
requirements.object: requirements as applicable to Payment System Operators (PSOs) as laid out in RBI circular DPSS

requirements.full_sentence:
An annual system audit, including cyber security audit, conducted by CERT-
In empanelled auditors shall be carried out and report thereof shall be
submitted to the respective Regional Office of DPSS, RBI within such
timelines as may be prescribed by RBI.
requirements.object: report thereof shall be submitted to the respective Regional Office of DPSS, RBI within such timelines as may be prescribed by RBI

requirements.full_sentence:
The PA shall also be guided by RBI circular CO.DPSS.OVRST.No.S447/06-
26-002/2024-25 dated July 30, 2024 on 'Master Directions on Cyber
Resilience and Digital Payment Security Controls for non-bank Payment
System Operators', as amended from time to time.
requirements.object: RBI circular CO

requirements.full_sentence:
A PA shall aggregate funds only for the merchant with whom it has a contractual
relationship.
requirements.object: the merchant with whom it has a contractual relationship

requirements.full_sentence: A PA business shall not carry out marketplace business.

A PA shall ensure that the extant instructions with regard to Merchant Discount
Rate (MDR) are followed.
requirements.object: instructions with regard to Merchant Discount Rate (MDR) are followed

requirements.full_sentence:
A PA shall also ensure that any charges, other than
the price of goods / service / investment amount, charged by a merchant, are
distinctly displayed to the payer prior to the transaction.
requirements.object: charges, other than the price of goods / service / investment amount, charged by a merchant, are distinctly displayed to the paye

requirements.full_sentence:
A PA shall not place limits on transaction amount for a particular payment
mode.
requirements.object: amount for a particular payment mode

requirements.full_sentence: The responsibility thereof shall lie with the issuing bank / non-bank entity;
requirements.object: bank / non-bank entity

requirements.full_sentence:
for instance, the card issuing bank shall be responsible for placing transaction
amount limits on cards issued by it based on the customer's credit worthiness,
spending nature, profile, etc.
requirements.object: transaction amount limits on cards issued by it based on the customer's credit worthiness, spending nature, profile, etc

requirements.full_sentence:
A PA shall not give an option for ATM PIN as a factor of authentication for card-
not-present transactions.
requirements.object: ATM PIN as a factor of authentication for card- not-present transactions

requirements.full_sentence:
All refunds shall be made to the original method of payment, unless specifically
instructed by the payer to credit the refund to an alternate mode belonging to
the same payer.
requirements.object: original method of payment

requirements.full_sentence: A PG, as defined in paragraph 4(j), shall not fall within the scope of this MD.
requirements.object: of this MD

requirements.full_sentence:
A PA may avail services of a PG in terms of RBI circulars
DoS.CO.CSITEG/SEC.1/31.01.015/2023-24 dated April 10, 2023 on 'Master
Direction on Information Technology Services', CO.DPSS.POLC.No.S-
384/02.32.001/2021-2022 dated August 3, 2021 on 'Framework for
Outsourcing of Payment and Settlement-related Activities by Payment System
Operators', and DBOD.NO.BP.40/21.04.158/2006-07 dated November 3, 2006
on 'Managing Risks and Code of Conduct in Outsourcing of Financial Services
by banks', as applicable and amended from time to time.
requirements.object: PG in terms of RBI circulars DoS

requirements.full_sentence:
Funds related to inward and outward transactions as carried out by a PA-CB
shall be kept separate.

For outward transactions, a PA - CB may directly on-board merchants located
abroad or enter into agreement with e-commerce marketplaces or entities
providing PA services abroad.
requirements.object: abroad or enter into agreement with e-commerce marketplaces or entities providing PA services abroad

requirements.full_sentence:
A PA-CB shall not purchase foreign currency from, or sell it to, any entity other
than an Authorised Dealer (AD).
requirements.object: or sell it to, any entity other than an Authorised Dealer (AD)

requirements.full_sentence:
In respect of inward or outward transactions
processed by a PA - CB, the maximum value per transaction shall be ₹25 lakh.

below of this MD,
shall ensure that all requirements under FEMA are adhered to.
requirements.object: under FEMA are adhered to

requirements.full_sentence:
AD-I Bank shall have automated processes to fetch the requisite information
from a PA - CB.
requirements.object: fetch the requisite information from a PA - CB

requirements.full_sentence:
To establish the bonafides of a transaction, the payment transaction (outward /
inward) shall be identified as a cross-border transaction.
requirements.object: cross-border transaction

requirements.full_sentence:
A Payment System
Provider shall make provisions for implementation of the same from such
timelines as specified by RBI.
requirements.object: of the same from such timelines as specified by RBI

requirements.full_sentence:
PA - CB shall provide the documents / information required by the exporter /
importer to the AD bank of the exporter / importer, for closure of their
corresponding entry in Export Data Processing and Monitoring System
(EDPMS) / Import Data Processing and Management System (IDPMS),
wherever applicable, (for the respective inward / outward remittance), in
compliance with the extant directions.
requirements.object: information required by the exporter / importer to the AD bank of the exporter / importer, for closure of their corresponding entry in Export Data Processing and Monitoring System (EDPMS) / Import Data Processing and Management System (IDPMS)

requirements.full_sentence:
Settlement in non-INR currencies shall be permitted only for those merchants
(Indian exporters) which have been directly onboarded by the PA - CB
facilitating inward transactions.
requirements.object: those merchants (Indian exporters) which have been directly onboarded by the PA - CB facilitating inward transactions

requirements.full_sentence:
Reports
An authorised PA shall submit reports as listed in Annexure 2 of this MD.
requirements.object: in Annexure 2 of this MD

requirements.full_sentence:
A PA shall undertake customer due diligence (CDD) of its merchants in
accordance with MD on KYC.
requirements.object: (CDD) of its merchants in accordance with MD on KYC

requirements.full_sentence:
While onboarding, the PA shall, with the merchant's
consent, retrieve the merchant's KYC record from CKYCR.
requirements.object: consent, retrieve the merchant's KYC record from CKYCR

requirements.full_sentence:
The process defined
in MD on KYC should be followed in case CKYCR record is found to be not
updated.
requirements.object: CKYCR record is found to be not updated

requirements.full_sentence:
One of the documents or the equivalent e-documents, as
prescribed for CDD of sole-proprietary firms or legal entities, should be
verified.
A PA shall undertake background and antecedent check of the merchant.
requirements.object: check of the merchant

requirements.full_sentence:
PA shall facilitate allotment of appropriate Merchant Category Code and
Merchant ID / Terminal ID to its merchants including those onboarded through an
overseas PA.
requirements.object: Merchant Category Code and Merchant ID / Terminal ID to its merchants including those onboarded through an oversea

requirements.full_sentence:
PA shall ensure that name of the merchant is captured
appropriately for all transactions processed for it.
requirements.object: the merchant is captured appropriately for all transactions processed for it

requirements.full_sentence:
A PA shall ensure that a marketplace onboarded by it does not accept payments
for a seller not onboarded on to the marketplace's platform.
requirements.object: onboarded by it does not accept payments for a seller not onboarded on to the marketplace's platform

requirements.full_sentence:
Necessary validation mechanisms shall be put in place by a PA to ensure that
funds due to a merchant are credited in the merchant's bank account only.
requirements.object: by a PA to ensure that funds due to a merchant are credited in the merchant's bank account only

requirements.full_sentence:
The PA must also monitor transactions subsequently undertaken by the
merchants to ensure that these transactions are in line with latter's business
profile and ensure adherence to other aspects of MD on KYC while conducting
its operations.
requirements.object: undertaken by the merchants to ensure that these transactions are in line with latter's business profile and en

requirements.full_sentence:
Non-bank PA shall register itself with the Financial Intelligence Unit-India (FIU-
IND) in compliance with MD on KYC and meet the reporting requirements listed
therein.
requirements.object: Financial Intelligence Unit-India (FIU- IND) in compliance with MD on KYC and meet the reporting requirements listed therein

requirements.full_sentence:
A PA, including an existing PA whose application is pending with Reserve Bank
of India for authorisation, shall ensure that merchants onboarded till December
31, 2025, comply with the above due diligence requirements within one year from
the date of this MD.
requirements.object: till December 31, 2025, comply with the above due diligence requirements within one year from the date of this MD

requirements.full_sentence:
From January 1, 2026, merchants should be onboarded in
accordance with due diligence requirements prescribed in this MD.
requirements.object: with due diligence requirements prescribed in this MD

requirements.full_sentence:
Acquiring bank shall have a policy for processing payments for merchants
acquired through an authorised non-bank PA.
requirements.object: processing payments for merchants acquired through an authorised non-bank PA

requirements.full_sentence:
Acquiring bank need not undertake the customer due diligence of the
merchant itself but should be able to obtain the required details whenever
required.
requirements.object: the required details whenever required

requirements.full_sentence:
Acquiring Bank of a non-bank PA shall ensure that merchants onboarded by
the PA are in compliance with acquiring bank's policy for merchant acquiring.
requirements.object: by the PA are in compliance with acquiring bank's policy for merchant acquiring

requirements.full_sentence:
A non-bank PA may utilise agents to undertake the following activities related
to due diligence of merchants:
i.
requirements.object: the following activities related to due diligence of merchants: i

requirements.full_sentence:
PA shall maintain the details of the agent
assisting the merchant, where services of such agents are
employed.
requirements.object: the agent assisting the merchant

requirements.full_sentence:
The non-bank PA shall carry out due diligence of the persons appointed as
authorised / designated agents.
requirements.object: of the persons appointed as authorised / designated agents

requirements.full_sentence:
The ultimate responsibility of due diligence shall lie on PA and agents can only
be used for limited purposes as prescribed above.
requirements.object: agents can only be used for limited purposes as prescribed above

requirements.full_sentence:
A non-bank PA shall maintain the funds collected on behalf of its merchants
in a separate escrow account with any Scheduled Commercial Bank (SCB) in
India.
requirements.object: on behalf of its merchants in a separate escrow account with any Scheduled Commercial Bank (SCB) in India

conditions: In case of a PA - CB
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of a PA - CB, such account shall also be referred to as Inward
Collection Account (InCA) for inward transactions and Outward Collection
Account (OCA) for outward transactions, as applicable.
requirements.object: as Inward Collection Account (InCA) for inward transactions and Outward Collection Account (OCA) for outward transactions, as appl

requirements.full_sentence:
Details of operations
in escrow accounts are incorporated in Table 1 below and the instructions
mentioned therein must be adhered to by December 31, 2025.
requirements.object: December 31, 2025

requirements.full_sentence:
Such escrow
accounts shall only be utilised for authorised PA business and not for any other
business.
requirements.object: authorised PA business and not for any other business

requirements.full_sentence:
Additional Escrow Account (at the discretion of PA)
One additional account may be maintained in a different SCB.
requirements.object: different SCB

requirements.full_sentence:
Inter-escrow A/c transfer
One additional account may be maintained in a different SCB.
requirements.object: different SCB

requirements.full_sentence: One additional account may be maintained in a different SCB (for each currency).
requirements.object: different SCB (for each currency)

requirements.full_sentence: Note: This permitted debit shall not be used to transfer funds from an entity acting as a BBPOU, as defined in Master Direction on BBPS to its BBPS escrow account except in case where the entity acts as a PA to an Agent Institution and on its behalf transfers funds to the BBPS escrow account of the BBPOU.
requirements.object: funds from an entity acting as a BBPOU, as defined in Master Direction on BBPS to its BBPS escrow account except in case where the

requirements.full_sentence:
Maintenance of day end balance in escrow account
Shall not be less than the amount realised in escrow towards funds payable to the merchants, but not settled to them.
requirements.object: amount realised in escrow towards funds payable to the merchants, but not settled to them

requirements.full_sentence: Interest-bearing No interest shall be payable on the balances maintained in the escrow account(s) except on the core portion amount of the domestic escrow account, subject to the conditions prescribed in paragraph 17 below.
requirements.object: balances maintained in the escrow account(s) except on the core portion amount of the domestic escrow account

requirements.full_sentence: No interest shall be payable on the balances.
requirements.object: balances

requirements.full_sentence: PA may migrate funds to an escrow account prior to authorisation but protection under paragraph 16 (b) of these Directions shall be available only after authorisation.
requirements.object: authorisation

requirements.full_sentence: Such an agreement should be fair, equitable and must transparently mention the settlement timelines.
requirements.object: must transparently mention the settlement timelines

requirements.full_sentence: Note: (a) An entity authorised to carry out PA-O and PA-P businesses shall use the same escrow account for both the business activities.
requirements.object: account for both the business activities

requirements.full_sentence:
(b) For the purposes of these directions, 'Core Portion' shall be computed as under:
Step 1: Compute lowest daily outstanding balance (LB) in the escrow account on a fortnightly (FN) basis, for 26 fortnights from the preceding month.
requirements.object: Step 1: Compute lowest daily outstanding balance (LB) in the escrow account on a fortnightly (FN) basis, for 26 fortnights from

requirements.full_sentence:
For the purposes of maintenance of an escrow account, payment system operated
by PA shall be deemed to be 'designated payment systems' under Section 23A of
the Payment and Settlements Systems Act, 2007.
requirements.object: 'designated payment systems' under Section 23A of the Payment and Settlements Systems Act, 2007

requirements.full_sentence:
The core portion of escrow account shall continue to be maintained within the escrow
account maintained for PA activity.
requirements.object: within the escrow account maintained for PA activity

requirements.full_sentence:
This facility shall be permissible to entities who have been in business for twenty-six
(26) fortnights and whose accounts have been duly audited for the full accounting
year.
requirements.object: who have been in business for twenty-six (26) fortnights and whose accounts have been duly audited for the full accounting

requirements.full_sentence:
For this purpose, the period of twenty-six fortnights shall be calculated from the
date of actual business operation in the account.
requirements.object: date of actual business operation in the account

requirements.full_sentence:
Banks shall not issue any receipt for
such deposits which may entitle PA to the funds available in the core portion or mark
any lien on the amount held in such form of deposits.
requirements.object: such deposits which may entitle PA to the funds available in the core portion or mark any lien on the amount held in such form o

requirements.full_sentence: The core portion shall be calculated separately for each escrow account.
requirements.object: each escrow account

requirements.full_sentence:
The escrow
balance maintained shall be clearly disclosed in the auditor's certificates to be
submitted to RBI on quarterly and annual basis.
requirements.object: the auditor's certificates to be submitted to RBI on quarterly and annual basis

requirements.full_sentence:
PA shall submit the list of merchants onboarded by it to the bank where it is
maintaining the escrow account and update the list prior to initiating settlement to
these merchants.
requirements.object: merchants onboarded by it to the bank where it is maintaining the escrow account and update the list prior to initiating settlement

requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall ensure that payments are made only to
eligible merchants and for permissible debits or credits as defined under this MD.
requirements.object: made only to eligible merchants and for permissible debits or credits as defined under this MD

requirements.full_sentence:
There shall be an exclusive clause in the agreement signed between the PA and the
bank maintaining escrow account towards usage of balance in escrow account only
as per the permissible debits or credits as mentioned in Table 1 above.
requirements.object: in the agreement signed between the PA and the bank maintaining escrow account towards usage of balance in escrow account only

requirements.full_sentence: The escrow account shall not be operated for 'Cash-on-Delivery' transactions.
requirements.object: transactions

requirements.full_sentence:
Funds for an outward transaction may be received in the escrow account of the PA
(and then transferred to the OCA of PA - CB) or directly in OCA of the PA - CB.
requirements.object: escrow account of the PA (and then transferred to the OCA of PA - CB) or directly in OCA of the PA - CB

requirements.full_sentence:
Onward transfer to the foreign merchants shall be carried out only by debit to the
OCA.
requirements.object: by debit to the OCA

conditions: In case a PA-CB also engages in domestic PA activity
requirements.full_sentence:
In case a PA-CB also engages in domestic PA activity, InCA and OCA shall be kept
separate from the escrow account(s) opened for such domestic PA activity.
requirements.object: the escrow account(s) opened for such domestic PA activity

conditions:
where registered office of PA
is situated
requirements.full_sentence:
A certificate, signed by the statutory auditor(s), shall be submitted by the authorised
entities to the respective Regional Office of DPSS, RBI, where registered office of PA
is situated, certifying that the entity has been maintaining balance(s) in the escrow
account(s) in compliance with these instructions, as per periodicity prescribed
in Annexure 2.
requirements.object: authorised entities to the respective Regional Office of DPSS, RBI

conditions: In case an additional escrow account is being maintained
requirements.full_sentence:
In case an additional escrow account is being maintained, it shall be
ensured that balances in both accounts are considered for the above certification and
that these are separately mentioned in the certificate.
requirements.object: in both accounts are considered for the above certification and that these are separately mentioned in the certificate

requirements.full_sentence:
The certificates shall be
submitted separately for domestic activity, i.e.
requirements.object: domestic activity, i

conditions: In case there is a need to shift the escrow account from one bank to another
requirements.full_sentence:
In case there is a need to shift the escrow account from one bank to another, the
same shall be effected in a time-bound manner without impacting the payment cycle
to merchants, under advice to RBI.
requirements.object: time-bound manner without impacting the payment cycle to merchants, under advice to RBI

requirements.full_sentence:
For banks, the outstanding balance in the escrow account shall be part of the 'net
demand and time liabilities' (NDTL) for the purposes of maintenance of reserve
requirements.
requirements.object: 'net demand and time liabilities' (NDTL) for the purposes of maintenance of reserve requirements

requirements.full_sentence:
This position shall be computed on the basis of balances appearing in
the books of the bank as on the date of reporting.
requirements.object: basis of balances appearing in the books of the bank as on the date of reporting

requirements.full_sentence:
Credits towards reversed transactions (where funds are received by PA) and refund
transactions shall be routed back through the escrow account unless the refund is
directly managed by the merchant and the payer has been made aware of the same,
in terms of the contract between a PA and merchant.
requirements.object: the escrow account unless the refund is directly managed by the merchant and the payer has been made aware of the same, in term

requirements.full_sentence:
The chargeback rights of
customers, as applicable, shall remain unaffected.

Notwithstanding such repeal as aforementioned, all authorisation / approvals
granted, actions taken, and acknowledgements issued under the aforesaid circulars/
Directions shall continue to be valid and shall be deemed to have been granted under
this MD.
requirements.object: and shall be deemed to have been granted under this MD

requirements.full_sentence:
The circulars, directions and guidelines so repealed shall be deemed to have been
in force until the date of coming into effect of this MD.
requirements.object: been in force until the date of coming into effect of this MD

requirements.full_sentence:
Information Security Governance: The entities at a minimum shall carry out
comprehensive security risk assessment of their people, IT, business process environment,
etc., to identify risk exposures with remedial measures and residual risks.
requirements.object: risk assessment of their people, IT, business process environment, etc

requirements.full_sentence:
Reports on risk assessment, security compliance posture,
security audit reports and security incidents shall be presented to the Board.
requirements.object: Board

requirements.full_sentence:
Data Security Standards: Data security standards and best practices like PCI-DSS, PCI-
SSF, latest encryption standards, transport channel security, etc., shall be implemented.

Security Incident Reporting: The entities shall report security incidents / card holder data
breaches to RBI within the stipulated timeframe to RBI.
requirements.object: card holder data breaches to RBI within the stipulated timeframe to RBI

requirements.full_sentence:
Monthly cyber security incident
reports with root cause analysis and preventive actions undertaken shall be submitted to
RBI.

Merchant Onboarding: The entities shall undertake comprehensive security assessment
during merchant onboarding process to ensure these minimal baseline security controls are
adhered to by the merchants.
requirements.object: during merchant onboarding process to ensure these minimal baseline security controls are adhered to by th

requirements.full_sentence:
Cyber Security Audit and Reports: The entities shall carry out and submit to the IT
Committee quarterly internal and annual external audit reports;
requirements.object: to the IT Committee quarterly internal and annual external audit reports

requirements.full_sentence:
Information Security: Board approved information security policy shall be reviewed
atleast annually.
The policy shall consider aspects like: alignment with business objectives;
requirements.object: with business objectives

requirements.full_sentence:
IT Governance: An IT policy shall be framed for regular management of IT functions and
ensure that detailed documentation in terms of procedures and guidelines exists and are
implemented.
requirements.object: management of IT functions and ensure that detailed documentation in terms of procedures and guidelines exists and are implement

requirements.full_sentence: The strategic plan and policy shall be reviewed annually.

The Board level IT
Governance framework shall have-

Involvement of Board: The major role of the Board / Top Management shall involve
approving information security policies, establishing necessary organisational processes /
functions for information security and providing necessary resources.
requirements.object: policies, establishing necessary organisational processes / functions for information security and providing ne

requirements.full_sentence:
IT Steering Committee: An IT Steering Committee shall be created with
representations from various business functions as appropriate.
requirements.object: from various business functions as appropriate

requirements.full_sentence:
The Committee shall assist
the Executive Management in implementation of the IT strategy approved by the Board.
requirements.object: in implementation of the IT strategy approved by the Board

requirements.full_sentence:
It
shall have well defined objectives and actions.
requirements.object: and actions

requirements.full_sentence:
Enterprise Information Model: The entities shall establish and maintain an enterprise
information model to enable applications development and decision-supporting activities,
consistent with board approved IT strategy.
requirements.object: enterprise information model to enable applications development and decision-supporting activities, consistent with board ap

requirements.full_sentence:
The model shall facilitate optimal creation, use
and sharing of information by a business, in a way that it maintains integrity, and is flexible,
functional, timely, secure and resilient to failure.
requirements.object: and sharing of information by a business, in a way that it maintains integrity, and is flexible, functional, timely,

requirements.full_sentence:
Cyber Crisis Management Plan: The entities shall prepare a comprehensive Cyber
Crisis Management Plan approved by the IT strategic committee and shall include
components such as Detection, Containment, Response and Recovery.
requirements.object: Crisis Management Plan approved by the IT strategic committee and shall include components such as Detection, Containmen

requirements.full_sentence:
Enterprise Data Dictionary: The entities shall maintain an "enterprise data dictionary"
incorporating the organisation's data syntax rules.
requirements.object: dictionary" incorporating the organisation's data syntax rules

requirements.full_sentence:
This shall enable sharing of data across
applications and systems, promote a common understanding of data across IT and business
users and prevent creation of incompatible data elements.
requirements.object: across applications and systems, promote a common understanding of data across IT and business users and prevent creation of in

requirements.full_sentence:
Risk Assessment: The risk assessment shall, for each asset within its scope, identify
the threat / vulnerability combinations and likelihood of impact on confidentiality, availability
or integrity of that asset - from a business, compliance and / or contractual perspective.
requirements.object: within its scope, identify the threat / vulnerability combinations and likelihood of impact on confidentiality, availability or integ

requirements.full_sentence:
Access to Application: There shall be documented standards / procedures for
administering an application system, which are approved by the application owner and kept
up-to-date.
requirements.object: procedures for administering an application system, which are approved by the application owner and kept up-to-date

requirements.full_sentence:
Access to the application shall be based on the principle of least privilege and
"need to know" commensurate with the job responsibilities.
requirements.object: principle of least privilege and "need to know" commensurate with the job responsibilities

requirements.full_sentence:
Vendor Risk Management: The Service Level Agreements (SLAs) for technology
support, including BCP-DR and data management shall categorically include clauses
permitting regulatory access to these set-ups.
requirements.object: regulatory access to these set-ups

requirements.full_sentence:
Maturity and Roadmap: The entities shall consider assessing their IT maturity level,
based on well-known international standards, design an action plan and implement the plan
to reach the target maturity level.
requirements.object: maturity level, based on well-known international standards, design an action plan and implement the plan to reach the tar

requirements.full_sentence:
Cryptographic Requirement: The entities shall select encryption algorithms which are
well established international standards and which have been subjected to rigorous scrutiny
by an international community of cryptographers or approved by authoritative professional
bodies, reputable security vendors or government agencies.
requirements.object: are well established international standards and which have been subjected to rigorous scrutiny by an international

requirements.full_sentence:
Forensic Readiness: All security events from the entities infrastructure including but
not limited to application, servers, middleware, endpoint, network, authentication events,
database, web services, cryptographic events and log files shall be collected, investigated
and analysed for proactive identification of security alerts.
requirements.object: analysed for proactive identification of security alerts

requirements.full_sentence:
Data Sovereignty: The entities shall take preventive measures to ensure storing data
in infrastructure that do not belong to external jurisdictions.
requirements.object: ensure storing data in infrastructure that do not belong to external jurisdictions

requirements.full_sentence:
Appropriate controls shall be
considered to prevent unauthorised access to the data.
requirements.object: unauthorised access to the data

requirements.full_sentence:
Data Security in Outsourcing: There shall be an outsourcing agreement providing 'right
to audit' clause to enable the entities / their appointed agencies and regulators to conduct
security audits.
requirements.object: providing 'right to audit' clause to enable the entities / their appointed agencies and regulators to conduct security aud

requirements.full_sentence:
Alternatively, third parties shall submit annual independent security audit
reports to the entities.
requirements.object: audit reports to the entities

requirements.full_sentence:
Payment Application Security: Payment applications shall be developed as per PCI-
SSF guidelines and complied with as required.
requirements.object: PCI- SSF guidelines and complied with as required

requirements.full_sentence:
The entities shall review PCI-DSS
compliance status as part of merchant onboarding process.
requirements.object: as part of merchant onboarding process

requirements.full_sentence:
2.1 The customer card credentials shall not be stored within the database or the server
accessed by the merchant.
requirements.object: database or the server accessed by the merchant

requirements.full_sentence:
2.2 Option for ATM PIN as a factor of authentication for card not present transactions shall
not be given.
2.3 Instructions on storage of payment system data, as applicable to PSOs, shall apply.

2.4 All refunds shall be made to original method of payment unless specifically agreed by
the customer to credit an alternate mode.
requirements.object: method of payment unless specifically agreed by the customer to credit an alternate mode

requirements.full_sentence:
The scope of audit shall encompass all relevant areas of information system
processes and applications.
requirements.object: of information system processes and applications
